reviews.name: Rahul Diamond
reviews.review: I have been working with Gurukrupa for the past few months for laser soldering work and the experience has been very reliable. The finishing is always clean, joints are strong, and there are no black marks after the work, which is very important for us. Their speed is impressive as well, around 100 spots in 30 minutes, so work gets completed quickly without compromising on quality. The office environment is comfortable with AC and proper seating, making it easy to manage work without hassle. Pricing is also reasonable for the quality they deliver. Overall, a dependable place for jewellery soldering and repair work.

reviews.name: Rushikesh Inamdar
reviews.review: I bought gold coins from Gurukrupa in 5 gm, 8 gm, 10 gm and some bigger sizes for investment. Experience was very good. All coins are 999.9 purity and BIS hallmarked, so I was confident about quality. They showed live rate and explained properly, so no confusion. Price was also better than other shops. Making charges are less compared to big brand jewellers, which helped me save some money. Coins finishing is good and packing was proper. Overall I am satisfied and will buy again for investment.

reviews.name: Amit Gupta
reviews.review: I visted for gold valuation and the experience was very smooth. Modern machines and honest valuation. Highly recommended.

reviews.name: Pooja Mehta
reviews.review: Very professional staff. They test your gold right in front of you, ensuring 100% transparency. Highly recommended for purity checks.

reviews.name: Kavita Joshi
reviews.review: Very professional service. Clean office and accurate gold testing.

reviews.name: Rohit Malhotra
reviews.review: They offered me the best rate compared to other shops. No hidden charges.

reviews.name: Anjali Singh
reviews.review: Quick process and friendly staff. I was impressed by their transparency.

reviews.name: Manoj Yadav
reviews.review: Very satisfied with the service. Instant payment and genuine evaluation.

reviews.name: Sneha Bansal
reviews.review: One of the best gold buyers I have visited. 100% trustworthy.
